full_text:
Chen Zhong (Xiaoxian) 陳忠 (孝先)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Zhong (陳忠), styledXiaoxian (孝先), was born in Yingchuan. Initially refused office. Chen Zhong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
